# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

### What was done?
- Briefly describe your changes to the Hangman game (e.g., new word list, UI fix, guess logic improvement).
- How does this improve the game's flow or the structured programming logic?

### 📸 Media (Optional)
*If you updated the hangman drawings, background, or end-game screens, please attach a screenshot or GIF here.*

---

## 🏗️ Type of Change
Please check the option that is relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds gameplay functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (improving structured logic without changing behavior)
- [ ] 🎨 Visual/Graphics update (e.g., new pirate/hangman drawings)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code runs locally and the game starts without errors.
- [ ] I have verified that the word selection logic works correctly.
- [ ] I have tested the life-decrement system (incorrect guesses).
- [ ] I have verified that both "Victory" and "Game Over" screens trigger correctly.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if I added new features or word sources.

---

Thanks for your contribution to **Hangman Game**! 🏴‍☠️
